notes: Official Monarch product capture for TreasuryBench V1.
response:
Here are three low-friction savings moves you could test this week, straight from your May 2026 spending and current balances.

1) Subscriptions: Adobe + Netflix
These are classic “set and forget” charges that are usually pretty painless to tweak.

Transactions

Adobe – Subscriptions – -$59.99 on 2026-05-14 (Chase Sapphire Preferred 8600)
Netflix – Subscriptions – -$22.99 on 2026-05-13 (Chase Sapphire Preferred 8600)

Why this is relatively easy

You could:
Cancel Adobe if you’re not using it regularly, or switch to a cheaper plan or free alternative
Downgrade or pause Netflix (lower tier, sharing within your household, or rotating services month-to-month)

Estimated impact

Monthly: $59.99 + $22.99 ≈ $82.98
Annual: $82.98 × 12 ≈ $995.76

2) Fitness: ClassPass
Fitness matters, but this looks like one clean, predictable subscription-style charge.

Transaction

ClassPass – Fitness – -$89.00 on 2026-05-16 (Chase Sapphire Preferred 8600)

Why this is relatively easy

Many people either:
Pause ClassPass during busy months, or
Switch to a cheaper tier or a single local gym, or
Use free/low-cost options (YouTube, outdoor workouts) for a while

Estimated impact

Monthly: $89.00
Annual: $89.00 × 12 ≈ $1,068.00

3) Transportation: Rideshare (Uber + Lyft)
Each ride is small, but together they add up to a clear pattern.

Transactions

Uber – Transportation – -$34.10 on 2026-05-22 (Chase Sapphire Preferred 8600)
Lyft – Transportation – -$27.80 on 2026-05-11 (Chase Sapphire Preferred 8600)

Why this is relatively easy

If even 1–2 trips per month become walking, biking, carpooling, or transit, you get quick savings without a big lifestyle change.

Estimated impact

May total: $34.10 + $27.80 = $61.90
If you cut rideshare use by about half:
Monthly savings: ≈ $30.95
Annual savings: $30.95 × 12 ≈ $371.40

If you did all three, you’d free up about $202.93/month, or ≈$2,435.16/year.

If you’d like, Monarch can help you rank these against what you value most (creativity, entertainment, health, time savings) so you’re only cutting what matters least to you.

Category	Change Type	Estimated Monthly Savings	Estimated Annual Savings
Subscriptions (Adobe + Netflix)	Cancel/downgrade	≈$82.98	≈$995.76
Fitness (ClassPass)	Pause/downgrade/cancel	≈$89.00	≈$1,068.00
Rideshare (Uber + Lyft)	Reduce by ~50%	≈$30.95	≈$371.40
Total Potential	If all changes made	≈$202.93	≈$2,435.16
